title: Ekhayeni Safe Place FC gets boost from Safe Hub
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Ekhayeni Safe Place FC...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Ekhayeni Safe Place FC recently received a generous donation of 10 cones and five used soccer balls from Knysna Safe Hub.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Ekhayeni Safe Place FC recently received a generous donation of 10 cones and five used soccer balls from Knysna Safe Hub."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The equipment will be invaluable as Ekhayeni FC prepare for upcoming participation in the Knysna Local Football Association (KLFA) and the domestic league."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With the proper tools in hand, the team is better equipped to compete and continue growing as athletes.","html":"With the proper tools in hand, the team is better equipped to compete and continue growing as athletes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Team manager Laurentia Ngqambuza expressed the team's gratitude: \"We look forward to making you proud and representing our community with pride.","html":"Team manager Laurentia Ngqambuza expressed the team's gratitude: \"We look forward to making you proud and representing our community with pride."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This contribution will have a significant impact on the team's development, enabling players to improve their skills and focus on their training.\"","html":"\"This contribution will have a significant impact on the team's development, enabling players to improve their skills and focus on their training.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ngqambuza invited the public to reach out to her at [email protected] or [email protected] if they are interested in donating equipment to help uplift the club.","html":"Ngqambuza invited the public to reach out to her at [email protected] or [email protected] if they are interested in donating equipment to help uplift the club."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Ekhayeni Safe Place FC gets boost from Safe Hub
